problem:
Pretty print in MongoDB shell as default.

Is there a way to tell Mongo to pretty print output? Currently, everything is output to a single line and it's difficult to read, especially with nested arrays and documents.

(attempted fix: --force-cache-reset "Force reset all caches")
memory_hint: Do not use --force-cache-reset. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--force-cache-reset` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
